title: interface with a single property and index property
description: Root `{a: string; [key: string]: string}` — a declared `a` plus a string-valued index signature. JSON and binary round-trip the declared property alongside any number of dynamic string keys; samples cover the index-only-on-`a` shape and one with an extra `b` key.
notes: The index signature admits every key, so strip and preserve decode identically — dynamic keys are never treated as undeclared.
